/usr/bin/c++   -march=core2 -msse2 -msse3 -mssse3 -mno-sse4.1 -mno-sse4.2 -mno-sse4a -mno-avx -mno-fma -mno-bmi2 -mno-avx2 -mno-xop -mno-fma4 -mno-avx512f -mno-avx512vl -mno-avx512pf -mno-avx512er -mno-avx512cd -mno-avx512dq -mno-avx512bw -mno-avx512ifma -mno-avx512vbmi -O3   CMakeFiles/main_svgSample.dir/main.cpp.o  -o ../../Linux-x86_64-Release/main_svgSample
